name: bmo
postCreateCommand: bash -lc "set -euo pipefail; cd frontend; (npm ci || npm install); cd ../backend; if python3 -c 'import sys; raise SystemExit(0 if sys.version_info >= (3, 14) else 1)'; then python3 -m pip install -U pip; python3 -m pip install -e '.[dev]'; else echo 'Skipping backend install: Python 3.14+ not available in this devcontainer image.'; fi"
